reviews.review_description: Whilst I really like the game. I love the concept, graphics and soundtrack/voice work. The only issue is the 'matches' area, as others have stated. It's a nightmare! I know what I had to do but the execution was terrible. My guy kept dropping the match when I didn't want him too. I gave up.
I loved it! It was very cool from beginning to end. A great adventure game without being too heavy. Highly recommend. Its inexpensive and really fun. Buy it! Play it! Have fun!

reviews.review_title: Thinking outside of the box (aka boat)
reviews.review_description: This is my very first experience with this type of puzzle game, so don’t judge me! I got stuck so many times. This took me hours to figure out, and I had to look up a few things. I literally could not figure out how to solve that pipe puzzle. And the task at the very end was completely beyond me. But after doing them both successfully, I always said “So obvious! Why couldn’t I figure that out?!” I feel I’ve definitely learned some handy puzzle solving techniques from this and look forward to putting my new found skills to use with similar games. The graphics are very cool and the story is beautiful. I will definitely play this again!
Short but sweet. Really enjoyed the story, narrative, immersion, and recursive puzzles.

reviews.review_title: A puzzle game in vr that feels vr...
reviews.review_description:
I wasn't sure if this game would be for me when I first heard about it, but after trying it I found myself enjoying it thoroughly until the end, and it feels like it was truly built with vr in mind and not as an afterthought...

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

To preface: I am a cheapskate, so when I read reviews saying this game is very short and can be completed in one sitting I was skeptical that this game would be worth it. To be fair: I waited until this game was on a big sale before buying it. Despite the short playtime I was blown away by the art and the attention to deal and the uniqueness of the puzzles despite them being quite easy.

As a result, I bought the sequel too without hesitation
Teleportarion and snap turning. Who on earth found this as a good idea. Takes away all immersion and looks like a demo.
It is a little short but I didn't play the game for long sessions. Turn the help/tips off for sure. Its completely worth the money! Lots of fun.

reviews.review_title: Most inventive games I've ever played
reviews.review_description: This game is super cool and a great use of VR. It's worth the money. I loved it!

A wonderful narrative, creative puzzles but ultimately a short experience.

Grateful to have picked it up for cheap. Full price is hard to justify such a short game.


—

This game is exquisite in every aspect. 
A lovely little story with out of the box puzzles. 
A treat for all ages.

Highly recommended for new comers to VR .
Experienced players will speed through it and I’m not sure there’s much re-playability.

Wonderful concept design that suits VR perfectly... with mind bending puzzles and beautiful narrative... BUT... Way too short for the price (only 4 puzzles?!). Also at times the control interface is very clunky and unrefined - causing a lot of frustration, especially when in seated mode. Sometimes the hand controls were harder than solving the puzzle! Compared to The Room VR which is more refined and longer gameplay.
Great cozy little game. Not very long though, I was able to finish it in one sitting, but still very enjoyable. If you are into short but fun little experiences, totally buy this game.

The game is pretty short (less than 2 hours without using hints).
The game mechanics are very unusual and you get puzzling, but sometimes the main mechanic didn't behave in the same way (especially with the small model in the room (don't want to spoiler the game).

Overall 4 stars, because the mechanic was a little unpredictable from time to time and it's very short - considering the price.

As someone who loves “escape room” type games I really enjoyed this. The story, puzzles, and concept were unique and interesting. It was a little short, which is really my only complaint if I had one.
Great fun, and yep easily completed in one sitting. But really nice.

I loved this game! The puzzles, the story line, all of it. I don’t know how people could have accomplished this game in an hour though. Some of the puzzles were very challenging. But, to be fair, I don’t generally play VR or even video games, so that could be why my dexterity is low. I don’t care, it was worth the purchase. It was a short game, but the graphics and immersion were wonderfully paired.
Creative recursive puzzle mechanic. Theming is nice, but the story and length felt a bit simple overall.
We all love this game, repayable to some extent and great story! Wish there were more of these stories that are just as good.

reviews.review_title: A must play in VR - so moving
reviews.review_description: I can't believe I hadn't heard of this title, yeah it's short (if your good at puzzles, can take hours if you get stuck) but my gosh this is a masterpiece of a VR title. The prologue is a great introduction to vr (grab the toothbrush, brush your teeth, press left to turn around, up to teleport) and the gameplay mechanic of doll house in a doll house in a doll house x infinity is just mind blowing. Sometimes things get stuck with the physics but leave it a moment and things teleport back to where they are. The story is great, maybe the best story ive experienced in VR and finishing the game just left me with that feeling like finishing portal and other great games. This kind of game/experience would only work in VR it wouldn't have the same impact as a flat screen game. Simply incredible and looking forward to playing the sequel.

It is a tech demo, but a very polished tech demo. Well worth £4.

It is only less than a minute of the total gameplay, but when sailing in the storm I had to close my eyes to avoid being motion sick.

I had hints turned off the whole time and it was quite easy.

The game, in my opinion, is boring and a waste of money.

Wish I could get back my payment.
I won't play it and there was no demo.
Good money, wasted.

reviews.review_title: Leaves your brain like a Mobius Strip
reviews.review_description:
This is a great puzzle, so long as you don't mind testing your perceptions of space and scale to the limit. It turns your brain back to front and inside out.
If it weren't so charming, I could get annoyed at how short it is (4 chapters of about 15 minutes each), but it is sweet and immersive and just makes your day a bit brighter. Recommended (but try to get it in a sale).
The sequel was the best! This game was fun but short, but definitely recommend playing this, then the second one, for the full story. What a memorable experience. Looking forward to a third

This game is so beautiful and immersive. The puzzle is just challenging enough to make you work for it without getting completely frustrated. LOL
Short but sweet. So worth it. Can’t wait to do A Fisherman’s Tale 2!
Whilst short. This is an exceptional vr adventure that makes wonderful use of the tech and has many ooh and ahhh moments and a sense of wonder. Highly recommended.
Really enjoyed this game. The only issue is that I wish that you could save at anytime.
Incredible game but didn’t last long over all 👍👍👍

reviews.review_title: A Feel Good Game with Depth
reviews.review_description: Loved this game for the brilliant and creative puzzles and empathic storytelling. Simply done while still having depth. Very well done! 🔥🔥❤️❤️✌️

I’m glad I got this on sale as I quickly finished this in under 45 minutes! The puzzles are very creative and original, playing with scale and perspective, and are very satisfying to solve. The dialogue was very entertaining to listen to as well! I look forward to trying the second one!
Original but very short. If you are used to puzzle games, you can do the whole game in 45 minutes. Glad I didn't pay full price.
I paid $4.99 for this when on sale. I finished the game in 30-45 minutes. This includes cutscenes. Way too short.

A bit on the short side (done in about two hours), great little atmospheric puzzle game…
Very recommended

Loved it, beautiful story that mash well with the VR technology, ￼ it has the best use of mini object and large object mirroring.  (Not sure if I’m describing it properly , maybe just playing and experience it yourself )

The soundtrack was also very good and in the same atmosphere of the rest of the game. 

One small bug that bugged me, playing this game standing up was difficult , as I was too tall for this game and needed to crunch the entire game. (I’m1.76 meter. ) 

Very recommended.

It is a short game taking around 1hour to complete but I'm sooo glad I purchased it! New style puzzle escape room game for me, so intuitive and I really had a blast playing through... I wish there were profiles you could save yours and your family had a different profile they were playing on, but I had to complete the whole game before anyone else could have a go.
Well worth playing through this one give it a go

Updated review. 
I’ve tried everything, including a factory reset, but the below issue remained the same. Until the last game update… the game is now starting again!
Happy that I can do another playthrough because I love this game. 
By the way, the devs tried to help me in a very friendly way. Much appreciated.

——————-
When starting the game the screen turns black with a turning white circle for a few secs and then I’m back in the Meta home environment. 

I tried uninstalling, rebooting and then reinstalling, but no luck. 

So far the only game I’ve had this issue with. 

Any tips?

developer_response.body: Happy to hear you're now back in the game. Thanks for taking the time to update your review and send us some nice words!

reviews.review_title: A house in a house in a house in a house
reviews.review_description: This game made my mind exploded and I love that like the wackiness in this game is so cool I’m not going to say anything at all I can say if you like weird puzzle games please get this because I want people to play this game for themselves and I really want them to be surprised on every puzzle

First off, this is a very short game. I think I finished it in about an hour. Nonetheless though, it's a fun experience, having some neat ideas on display. If you don't mind the length, the game's biggest issue is that the puzzles are very much on the easy side. There's a hint option in the menu, but I feel that anyone with even the slightest puzzle game experience wouldn't need them. Only other issue that I faced was an item vanished, preventing me from containing a chapter and I needed to restart it. This wasted a bit of time.

I played it from start to finish in one sitting. Wish it was longer, but it's a great story. I really enjoyed the gameplay from the different views, like the dollhouse perspective. If you're looking for a different type of way to solve puzzles and a great story - get this game, you won't be disappointed.

reviews.review_title: very good, very short and expensive.
reviews.review_description: Great story, fantastic strategy for abstract reasoning; but as I said in the title, it's expensive for such a short playing time. Thanks for reading my review. John
I’d love to play this… but it won’t start. The menu loads, then the buttons do nothing. Had to request a refund. Not the first person to flag this so not impressed with the developers.
Thr rope on the crane goes crazy and can't go any further in game.

reviews.review_title: Very Short, Clunky, and mediocre plot
reviews.review_description:
Very clunky teleport, especially when you are carrying objects, only snap turn, very bad object grabbing, and the game last less than 1h30
Instead of enjoying it, the game made me upset

reviews.review_title: Fun and well done but short
reviews.review_description: I enjoyed the game, one of the first I bought.  It was a little short but reasonably challenging and the concept is great.

Should you decide to buy this game I *highly* recommend turning off tips before you start. The game is not terribly difficult and I have a feeling the tips would make an already fairly short game even shorter. I got it on sale (30% off) and feel that price is about right for the amount of time it takes to play. There likely isn't much in the lines of replay value, but would be fun to show others that like puzzle games as well. The description says you can play this sitting...though unless you're on a swivel chair/stool I think it might be hard to play. There are a few steps that require reaching up or down and while you can extend your arm using a button, it takes away from the VR aspect if you don't move around...so stand up! But make sure you have plenty of space to move around.

I loved this game. The storyline is incredible. The whole game is beautiful. You will be forced to think outside of the box. The puzzles are very fun, simple but in a nice way. I wish it was longer. I read someone say in a review that this is the kind of game you finish with a smile on your face. That was what I was looking for and that’s what I got. It was so Worth it.

This is my first review. I found this to be a fun game and the hints are nice. The only thing I didn’t like about it was it’s way too short, I completed it in about 3 hours of play, that makes it pretty pricey for such a short game play.
Wonderful room escape game. Using scaling to progress through the game
The narration and setting flows easily and allows players to seamlessly interact with the game

So even though this game isn’t 100% perfect I’d still like to give it 5 stars because I feel like part of my problems came from me being new to VR. Sometimes I felt like the controls could be better, but I worked it out pretty easily. I was happy that the puzzles weren’t over easy, especially at the end. Once I realized that you could put it on sitting mode rather than standing life got much easier too. The story is super fun and cute, and totally fun for an adult! I really loved this tiny little world, with its awesome soundtrack and cute characters. It lacks some replayability, due to the straightforward story line, but I’m pretty sure that, like a good book, I’ll get hit with some surprises when I play again in 6 months or so.

This game totally deserved vr game of the year and it highlights what is so great about Vr. It’s immersive, it’s adventurous, it’s humorous, it’s a perfect blend of amazing things that makes the game enjoyable. It is pretty short but overall worth it. It’ll be hard finding a game that can top this.

The meticulous detail implemented in this game leaves you both astonished and wanting more. The design and music were so captivating, I spent most of my time just wandering around inside the game appreciating my surroundings rather than continuing the storyline. The interactions with the objects and characters within the game felt so lifelike, with the soothing narrator’s voice creating different personalities, I felt like I was inside a novel. The concept is similar to the film, “Inception”. A truly beautiful experience, I wish it never ended.
Lever games with brilliant concept and mechanics. Left me wanting so much more.
Absolutely great game, wonderful ending. Incredibly fun!
I am new to Oculus. This game blew my mind. I saw myself as the fisherman in the mirror. Drive a boat. Was underwater. There are some glitches in the game but easy for me to over look. ❤️ this game.
This is a very great game. It makes you think. I beat it in around 2 hours. Amazing game i I hope the developers make another one
I enjoyed playing it but wish it would have been longer!
Was so sad to finish this game, I hope there is another version coming out soon.
Awesome visuals, interesting puzzles, and surprises in each chapter. The look and sound of it alone were intriguing, and the gameplay felt unique and charming to me. I recommend.

I loved this game, it was a fun story to play through. I enjoyed the visuals and the voice overs and everything about it. It’s not really something I would probably play over again, but it was pretty inexpensive so I would say it was worth it.
Intriguing reality-bending puzzles and an utterly charming storyline. I love this game.
